---
title: 'Brent Volatility Dynamics: A Bayesian Analysis'
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(quantmod)
library(cmdstanr)
library(posterior)
library(tibble)
library(bayesplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(quantmod)
library(knitr)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

```

```{r}
brent <- read.csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/oil-prices/main/data/brent-daily.csv")
colnames(brent) <- c("Date", "Price")
brent$Date <- as.Date(brent$Date)
brent$Price <- as.numeric(brent$Price)
brent <- brent[order(brent$Date), ]
brent <- brent[is.finite(brent$Price) & brent$Price > 0, ]

lco <- read.csv("lco.csv")
colnames(lco) <- c("Date","Close","Net","PctChg","Open","Low","High","Volume","OI","Bid","Ask","Expiry")
lco$Date <- as.Date(lco$Date, format="%d-%b-%Y")
lco <- lco[order(lco$Date), ]
lco$Close <- as.numeric(lco$Close)
lco <- lco[is.finite(lco$Close) & lco$Close > 0, ]

getSymbols("DCOILWTICO", src = "FRED", from = "1987-01-01")

wti <- data.frame(
  Date = index(DCOILWTICO),
  Price = as.numeric(DCOILWTICO)
)
wti <- wti[is.finite(wti$Price) & wti$Price > 0, ]

r_brent <- diff(log(brent$Price))
dates_brent <- brent$Date[-1]

r_lco <- diff(log(lco$Close))
dates_lco <- lco$Date[-1]

r_wti <- diff(log(wti$Price))
dates_wti <- wti$Date[-1]

common_bw <- intersect(dates_brent, dates_wti)
r_b_wti <- r_brent[dates_brent %in% common_bw]
r_w_wti <- r_wti[dates_wti %in% common_bw]

common_bl <- intersect(dates_brent, dates_lco)
r_b_lco <- r_brent[dates_brent %in% common_bl]
r_l_lco <- r_lco[dates_lco %in% common_bl]

length(r_b_wti); length(r_w_wti)
length(r_b_lco); length(r_l_lco)


hist(r_wti, breaks = 100, main = "WTI Log Returns", col = "gray")
hist(r_brent, breaks = 100, main = "Brent Log Returns", col = "gray")
```

```{r}
bw <- merge(
  data.frame(Date = brent$Date, r_brent = c(NA, diff(log(brent$Price)))),
  data.frame(Date = wti$Date,   r_wti   = c(NA, diff(log(wti$Price)))),
  by = "Date",
  all = FALSE 
)

bw <- bw[complete.cases(bw), ]

r_brent_bw <- bw$r_brent
r_wti_bw   <- bw$r_wti
T_bw       <- nrow(bw)

head(bw)


bl <- merge(
  data.frame(Date = brent$Date, r_brent = c(NA, diff(log(brent$Price)))),
  data.frame(Date = lco$Date,   r_lco   = c(NA, diff(log(lco$Close)))),
  by = "Date",
  all = FALSE
)

bl <- bl[complete.cases(bl), ]

r_brent_bl <- bl$r_brent
r_lco_bl   <- bl$r_lco
T_bl       <- nrow(bl)

head(bl)
```

```{r}
bw_long <- bw %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(r_brent, r_wti), names_to = "Benchmark", values_to = "Return")

p_returns <- ggplot(bw_long, aes(x = Date, y = Return, color = Benchmark)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Daily Log-Returns: Brent vs. WTI",
       y = "Log Return", x = "Date") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("r_brent" = "blue", "r_wti" = "red"))

w_wti_dominant <- bw %>%
  filter(abs(r_wti) >= abs(r_brent))

p10 <- ggplot(bw_wti_dominant, aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = r_wti, color = "WTI Dominant"), alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "WTI Volatility Dominance",
       y = "Daily Log Return", x = "Year") 

p11 <- ggplot(bw, aes(x = abs(r_brent), y = abs(r_wti))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "grey") +
  geom_point(data = bw_wti_dominant, aes(x = abs(r_brent), y = abs(r_wti)), 
             color = "red", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Absolute Return Comparison",
       x = "|Brent Return| (Volatility Proxy)",
       y = "|WTI Return| (Volatility Proxy)") 

wti_more_volatile <- sum(abs(bw$r_wti) > abs(bw$r_brent))
brent_more_volatile <- sum(abs(bw$r_brent) > abs(bw$r_wti))
ties <- sum(abs(bw$r_wti) == abs(bw$r_brent))
total_days <- nrow(bw)

cat("Total Observations:", total_days, "\n")
cat("WTI More Volatile (|r_wti| > |r_brent|):", wti_more_volatile, 
    "(", round(wti_more_volatile/total_days * 100, 2), "%)\n")
cat("Brent More Volatile (|r_brent| > |r_wti|):", brent_more_volatile, 
    "(", round(brent_more_volatile/total_days * 100, 2), "%)\n")
cat("Ties:", ties, "\n")

extreme_stats <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Brent Returns", "WTI Returns"),
  Min = c(min(bw$r_brent), min(bw$r_wti)),
  Max = c(max(bw$r_brent), max(bw$r_wti)),
  Max_Abs = c(max(abs(bw$r_brent)), max(abs(bw$r_wti)))
)


```


```{r}

stan_code <- "
data {
  int<lower=0> T;
  vector[T] r_brent;
  vector[T] r_wti;
}

parameters {
  real mu_b;
  real mu_w;
  real<lower=0> sigma_b;
  real<lower=0> sigma_w;
}

model {
  mu_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  mu_w ~ normal(0, 10);

  sigma_b ~ exponential(1);
  sigma_w ~ exponential(1);

  r_brent ~ normal(mu_b, sigma_b);
  r_wti   ~ normal(mu_w, sigma_w);
}
"

mod <- cmdstan_model(write_stan_file(stan_code))

fit_joint <- mod$sample(
  data = list(
    T = T,
    r_brent = r_brent,
    r_wti = r_wti
  ),
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 1000,
  chains = 4
)

post <- fit_joint$draws()

sigma_b <- as_draws_matrix(post)[, "sigma_b"]
sigma_w <- as_draws_matrix(post)[, "sigma_w"]

summary_stats <- fit_joint$summary(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w"))


summary_df <- data.frame(
  mean_sig_b = summary_stats$mean[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  sd_sig_b   = summary_stats$sd[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  mean_sig_w = summary_stats$mean[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  sd_sig_w   = summary_stats$sd[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  rhat_b     = summary_stats$rhat[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  rhat_w     = summary_stats$rhat[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  prob_gt    = mean(sigma_b > sigma_w) 
)


plot(density(sigma_b), col = "red", main = "Volatility Comparison")
lines(density(sigma_w), col = "blue")


mcmc_trace(fit_joint$draws(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w")))

fit_joint$summary(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w"))
```




```{r}

r_brent <- as.numeric(r_brent)
r_wti   <- as.numeric(r_wti)

stan_code <- "
data {
  int<lower=0> T;
  vector[T] r_brent;
  vector[T] r_wti;
}

parameters {
  real mu_b;
  real mu_w;

  real<lower=0.01, upper=5> sigma_b;
  real<lower=0.01, upper=5> sigma_w;

  real<lower=2, upper=30> nu_b;
  real<lower=2, upper=30> nu_w;
}

model {
  mu_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  mu_w ~ normal(0, 10);

  sigma_b ~ normal(0, 1);
  sigma_w ~ normal(0, 1);

  nu_b ~ gamma(2, 0.1);
  nu_w ~ gamma(2, 0.1);

  r_brent ~ student_t(nu_b, mu_b, sigma_b);
  r_wti   ~ student_t(nu_w, mu_w, sigma_w);
}
"

mod <- cmdstan_model(write_stan_file(stan_code))

fit <- mod$sample(
  data = list(
    T = length(r_brent),
    r_brent = r_brent,
    r_wti = r_wti
  ),
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 1000,
  chains = 4
)

post <- fit$draws()

sigma_b <- as.vector(posterior::as_draws_matrix(post)[, "sigma_b"])
sigma_w <- as.vector(posterior::as_draws_matrix(post)[, "sigma_w"])

db <- density(sigma_b)
dw <- density(sigma_w)

df <- data.frame(
  sigma = c(sigma_b, sigma_w),
  series = rep(c("Brent", "WTI"), each = length(sigma_b))
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = sigma, fill = series, color = series)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Posterior Volatility Comparison",
       x = "Sigma",
       y = "Density")


mean(sigma_b > sigma_w)

diff_sigma <- sigma_b - sigma_w

mean(diff_sigma)

quantile(diff_sigma, c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975))

mean(diff_sigma > 0)

p_trace_sigma <- mcmc_trace(fit$draws(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w"))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Trace Plots: Brent vs. WTI (Student-t Scale)")


p_trace_nu <- mcmc_trace(fit$draws(c("nu_b", "nu_w"))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Trace Plots: Degrees of Freedom (nu)",
       subtitle = "Lower nu means fatter tails")

p_trace_mu <- mcmc_trace(fit$draws(c("mu_b", "mu_w"))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Trace Plots: Mean Returns (mu)")

```

```{r}

indicator_vector <- (sigma_b > sigma_w)

prob_val <- mean(indicator_vector)

prob_mcse <- mcse_mean(indicator_vector)

summary_stats <- fit$summary(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w"))

indicator <- (sigma_b > sigma_w)
p_val <- mean(indicator)
p_mcse <- mcse_mean(indicator)

summary_df <- data.frame(
  prob_gt    = p_val,
  prob_mcse  = p_mcse                     
)

summary_stats <- fit$summary(c("sigma_b", "sigma_w"))

summary_df <- data.frame(
  mean_sig_b = summary_stats$mean[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  sd_sig_b   = summary_stats$sd[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  mean_sig_w = summary_stats$mean[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  sd_sig_w   = summary_stats$sd[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  rhat_b     = summary_stats$rhat[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_b"],
  rhat_w     = summary_stats$rhat[summary_stats$variable == "sigma_w"],
  prob_gt    = mean(sigma_b > sigma_w)
)

draws_df <- data.frame(sigma_b = sigma_b, sigma_w = sigma_w)

ggplot(draws_df, aes(x = sigma_b, y = sigma_w)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "purple") + 
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Joint Posterior Distribution of Volatility",
       subtitle = "Every draw confirms WTI volatility is higher than Brent",
       x = "Estimated sigma (Brent)",
       y = "Estimated sigma (WTI)") +
  coord_fixed()

```

```{r}

set.seed(1)
S <- 20000 

r_brent <- as.numeric(na.omit(r_brent))
r_wti   <- as.numeric(na.omit(r_wti))

loglik_t <- function(mu, sigma, nu, r) {
  sum(dt((r - mu) / sigma, df = nu, log = TRUE) - log(sigma))
}

log_mean_exp <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & !is.infinite(x)]
  if(length(x) == 0) return(-Inf)
  m <- max(x)
  m + log(mean(exp(x - m)))
}


mu_b_n    <- rnorm(S, 0.0005, 0.005)
mu_w_n    <- rnorm(S, 0.0006, 0.005)
sigma_b_n <- runif(S, 0.01, 0.03) 
sigma_w_n <- runif(S, 0.01, 0.03)

mu_b_t    <- rnorm(S, 0.0005, 0.005)
mu_w_t    <- rnorm(S, 0.0006, 0.005)
sigma_b_t <- runif(S, 0.01, 0.03)
sigma_w_t <- runif(S, 0.01, 0.03)
nu_b_t    <- runif(S, 2, 10) 
nu_w_t    <- runif(S, 2, 10) 

logw_n <- numeric(S)
logw_t <- numeric(S)

for (s in 1:S) {
  logw_n[s] <- sum(dnorm(r_brent, mu_b_n[s], sigma_b_n[s], log = TRUE)) +
               sum(dnorm(r_wti, mu_w_n[s], sigma_w_n[s], log = TRUE))
  
  logw_t[s] <- loglik_t(mu_b_t[s], sigma_b_t[s], nu_b_t[s], r_brent) +
               loglik_t(mu_w_t[s], sigma_w_t[s], nu_w_t[s], r_wti)
}

logZ_n <- log_mean_exp(logw_n)
logZ_t <- log_mean_exp(logw_t)
BF <- logZ_t - logZ_n

prob_t <- if (BF > 100) 1 else if (BF < -100) 0 else 1 / (1 + exp(-BF))


```

```{r}
r <- r_brent
r <- scale(r)
r <- as.numeric(r)

sv1<-"data {
  int<lower=0> T;
  vector[T] r;
}

parameters {
  vector[T] z;
  real mu;
  real<lower=-0.9, upper=0.9> phi;
  real<lower=0> sigma_h;
}

transformed parameters {
  vector[T] h;

  h[1] = mu + sigma_h * z[1] / sqrt(1 - square(phi));

  for (t in 2:T)
    h[t] = mu + phi * (h[t-1] - mu) + sigma_h * z[t];
}

model {
  mu ~ normal(0, 1);
  phi ~ normal(0, 0.5);
  sigma_h ~ normal(0, 1);

  z ~ normal(0, 1);

  r ~ normal(0, exp(h / 2) + 1e-6);
}
"
mod <- cmdstan_model(write_stan_file(sv1))

fit_sv <- mod$sample(
  data = list(T = length(r), r = r),
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 1000,
  chains = 4,
  adapt_delta = 0.95
)



```

```{r}
fit_sv$cmdstan_diagnose()
sum_df <- fit_sv$summary()
sum_df$rhat
sum_df$ess_bulk
sum_df$ess_tail

draws <- fit_sv$draws()
mcmc_trace(draws, pars = c("mu", "phi", "sigma_h"))
```

```{r}
fit_sv$diagnostic_summary()
fit_sv$summary(c("mu","phi","sigma_h"))
```


```{r}

r_b <- 100 * r_b_lco
r_w <- 100 * r_l_lco

sv2_correlated<-
"data {
  int<lower=0> T;
  vector[T] r_b;
  vector[T] r_w;
}

parameters {
  real mu_b;
  real mu_w;

  real<lower=-0.95, upper=0.95> phi_b;
  real<lower=-0.95, upper=0.95> phi_w;

  real<lower=0> sigma_b;
  real<lower=0> sigma_w;

  real<lower=-1, upper=1> rho;

  // independent shocks
  vector[T] z_b;
  vector[T] z_w;
}

transformed parameters {
  vector[T] h_b;
  vector[T] h_w;

  vector[T] eps_b;
  vector[T] eps_w;

  for (t in 1:T) {
    eps_b[t] = z_b[t];
    eps_w[t] = rho * z_b[t] + sqrt(1 - square(rho)) * z_w[t];
  }

  h_b[1] = mu_b;
  h_w[1] = mu_w;

  for (t in 2:T) {
    h_b[t] = mu_b + phi_b * (h_b[t-1] - mu_b) + sigma_b * eps_b[t];
    h_w[t] = mu_w + phi_w * (h_w[t-1] - mu_w) + sigma_w * eps_w[t];
  }
}

model {
  mu_b ~ normal(0, 1);
  mu_w ~ normal(0, 1);

  phi_b ~ normal(0, 0.3);
  phi_w ~ normal(0, 0.3);

  sigma_b ~ normal(0, 0.3);
  sigma_w ~ normal(0, 0.3);

  rho ~ normal(0, 0.3);

  z_b ~ normal(0, 1);
  z_w ~ normal(0, 1);

  // likelihood
  for (t in 1:T) {
    r_b[t] ~ normal(0, exp(h_b[t] / 2) + 1e-3);
    r_w[t] ~ normal(0, exp(h_w[t] / 2) + 1e-3);
  }
}
"

mod <- cmdstan_model(write_stan_file(sv2_correlated))

fit_sv <- mod$sample(
  data = list(
    T = length(r_b),
    r_b = as.numeric(r_b),
    r_w = as.numeric(r_w)
  ),
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 500,
  chains = 1,
  adapt_delta = 0.95
)

```


```{r}

post <- fit_sv$draws()
post_mat <- as_draws_matrix(post)
mu_b <- post_mat[, "mu_b"]
mu_w <- post_mat[, "mu_w"]

phi_b <- post_mat[, "phi_b"]
phi_w <- post_mat[, "phi_w"]

sigma_b <- post_mat[, "sigma_b"]
sigma_w <- post_mat[, "sigma_w"]

rho <- post_mat[, "rho"]

summary_tbl <- data.frame(
  param = c("mu_b","mu_w","phi_b","phi_w","sigma_b","sigma_w","rho"),
  mean  = c(
    mean(mu_b), mean(mu_w),
    mean(phi_b), mean(phi_w),
    mean(sigma_b), mean(sigma_w),
    mean(rho)
  ),
  sd = c(
    sd(mu_b), sd(mu_w),
    sd(phi_b), sd(phi_w),
    sd(sigma_b), sd(sigma_w),
    sd(rho)
  )
)

summary_tbl


h_b <- post_mat[, grep("^h_b\\[", colnames(post_mat))]
h_w <- post_mat[, grep("^h_w\\[", colnames(post_mat))]

sigma_b_t <- exp(h_b / 2)
sigma_w_t <- exp(h_w / 2)

sigma_b_mean <- apply(sigma_b_t, 2, mean)
sigma_w_mean <- apply(sigma_w_t, 2, mean)

sigma_b_lower <- apply(sigma_b_t, 2, quantile, 0.025)
sigma_b_upper <- apply(sigma_b_t, 2, quantile, 0.975)

sigma_w_lower <- apply(sigma_w_t, 2, quantile, 0.025)
sigma_w_upper <- apply(sigma_w_t, 2, quantile, 0.975)

gap <- sigma_b_t - sigma_w_t

gap_mean <- apply(gap, 2, mean)
gap_ci_l <- apply(gap, 2, quantile, 0.025)
gap_ci_u <- apply(gap, 2, quantile, 0.975)

prob_b_gt_w <- colMeans(sigma_b_t > sigma_w_t)

mean(rho)
quantile(rho, c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975))


vol_df <- tibble(
  time = 1:length(sigma_b_mean),
  sigma_b = sigma_b_mean,
  sigma_w = sigma_w_mean,
  gap = gap_mean,
  prob_b_gt_w = prob_b_gt_w
)

```

```{r}
mv<-"data {
  int<lower=0> T;
  matrix[T,2] r;
}

parameters {
  vector[2] mu;
  vector<lower=-1, upper=1>[2] phi;
  vector<lower=0>[2] sigma_h;
  matrix[T,2] h_std;    
  
  real<lower=-1, upper=1> phi_x; 
  real<lower=0> sigma_x;
  vector[T] x_std;
}

model {
  matrix[T,2] h;
  vector[T] x;
  
  for (j in 1:2) h[1, j] = h_std[1, j] * sigma_h[j] / sqrt(1 - square(phi[j]));
  for (t in 2:T) {
    for (j in 1:2) h[t, j] = phi[j] * h[t-1, j] + sigma_h[j] * h_std[t, j];
  }
  
  x[1] = x_std[1] * sigma_x / sqrt(1 - square(phi_x)); 
  for (t in 2:T) x[t] = phi_x * x[t-1] + sigma_x * x_std[t];

  mu ~ normal(0, 1);
  phi ~ normal(0.9, 0.1);
  sigma_h ~ exponential(5);
  phi_x ~ normal(0.9, 0.1);
  sigma_x ~ exponential(5);
  to_vector(h_std) ~ std_normal();
  x_std ~ std_normal();

  for (t in 1:T) {
    real s1 = exp(0.5 * h[t,1]);
    real s2 = exp(0.5 * h[t,2]);
    real r12 = 0.95 * (2 * inv_logit(x[t]) - 1);

    real y1 = r[t,1] - mu[1];
    real y2 = r[t,2] - mu[2];
    real one_m_r2 = 1 - square(r12);

    real det = square(s1) * square(s2) * one_m_r2;
    real quad = square(y1 / s1) + square(y2 / s2) - 2 * r12 * (y1 * y2) / (s1 * s2);

    target += -0.5 * (log(det) + quad / one_m_r2);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[T] sigma1;
  vector[T] sigma2;
  vector[T] rho;

  {
    matrix[T,2] h_gen;
    vector[T] x_gen;

    for (j in 1:2) h_gen[1, j] = h_std[1, j] * sigma_h[j] / sqrt(1 - square(phi[j]));
    for (t in 2:T) {
      for (j in 1:2) h_gen[t, j] = phi[j] * h_gen[t-1, j] + sigma_h[j] * h_std[t, j];
    }
    
    x_gen[1] = x_std[1] * sigma_x / sqrt(1 - square(phi_x)); 
    for (t in 2:T) x_gen[t] = phi_x * x_gen[t-1] + sigma_x * x_std[t];

    for (t in 1:T) {
      sigma1[t] = exp(0.5 * h_gen[t,1]);
      sigma2[t] = exp(0.5 * h_gen[t,2]);
      rho[t] = 0.95 * (2 * inv_logit(x_gen[t]) - 1);
    }
  }
}
"

mod <- cmdstan_model(write_stan_file(mv))

r <- cbind(as.numeric(r_b_lco), as.numeric(r_l_lco))

fit_sv <- mod$sample(
  data = list(
    T = nrow(r),
    r = r
  ),
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 500,
  chains = 4,
  adapt_delta = .95)

```

```{r}
draws <- fit_sv$draws(c("rho", "sigma1", "sigma2"), format = "matrix")


rho_summary   <- fit_sv$summary("rho")
sig1_summary  <- fit_sv$summary("sigma1")
sig2_summary  <- fit_sv$summary("sigma2")


```

```{r}

rho_vec  <- rho_df  %>% arrange(t) %>% pull(rho)
sig1_vec <- s1_df   %>% arrange(t) %>% pull(sigma_spot)
sig2_vec <- s2_df   %>% arrange(t) %>% pull(sigma_futures)


proof_df <- tibble(
    r_b_lco = as.numeric(r_b_lco),
    r_l_lco = as.numeric(r_l_lco),
    rho           = rho_vec,
    sigma_spot    = sig1_vec,
    sigma_futures = sig2_vec
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t         = row_number(),
    basis     = r_b_lco - r_l_lco,
    vol_ratio = sigma_spot / sigma_futures
  )


summary(proof_df$rho)

ggplot(proof_df, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rho, color = "Correlation (rho)")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = basis / max(abs(basis)), color = "Normalized Basis")) +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}

plot_data <- proof_df %>% tail(1500) 

p1 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = t, y = basis)) +
  geom_area(fill = "firebrick", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Basis", y = "Spot - Futures") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = t, y = rho)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Time-Varying rho", y = "Correlation") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 / p2

regime_check <- proof_df %>%
  mutate(regime = if_else(basis < quantile(basis, 0.05, na.rm=TRUE), "Stress", "Normal")) %>%
  group_by(regime) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_correlation = mean(rho),
    avg_vol_ratio = mean(vol_ratio),
    n_days = n()
  )


```





```{r}

scalar_pars <- c("mu[1]", "mu[2]", "phi[1]", "phi[2]", 
                 "sigma_h[1]", "sigma_h[2]", "phi_x", "sigma_x")

draws_scalars <- fit_sv$draws(variables = scalar_pars)

mcmc_trace(draws_scalars)
mcmc_pairs(draws_scalars, pars = c("phi[1]", "phi[2]", "sigma_h[1]", "sigma_h[2]"))

s1_summary <- fit_sv$summary("sigma1", "mean", ~quantile(.x, probs = c(0.05, 0.95)))
s2_summary <- fit_sv$summary("sigma2", "mean", ~quantile(.x, probs = c(0.05, 0.95)))
rho_summary <- fit_sv$summary("rho", "mean", ~quantile(.x, probs = c(0.05, 0.95)))

colnames(s1_summary)[3:4] <- c("low", "high")
colnames(s2_summary)[3:4] <- c("low", "high")
colnames(rho_summary)[3:4] <- c("low", "high")

plot(s1_summary$mean, type="l", col="blue", 
     ylim = c(0, max(s1_summary$high, s2_summary$high)),
     main = "Volatility Paths", ylab = "Sigma", xlab = "Time")
lines(s1_summary$low, lty=2, col="blue")
lines(s1_summary$high, lty=2, col="blue")

lines(s2_summary$mean, col="red")
lines(s2_summary$low, lty=2, col="red")
lines(s2_summary$high, lty=2, col="red")
legend("topright", legend=c("Market 1", "Market 2"), col=c("blue", "red"), lty=1)

vol_ratio <- s1_summary$mean / s2_summary$mean
plot(vol_ratio, type = "l", main = "Relative Volatility (M1 / M2)", 
     ylab = "Ratio", xlab = "Time")
abline(h = 1, lty = 2)

plot(rho_summary$mean, type = "l", ylim = c(-1, 1),
     main = "Time-Varying Correlation", ylab = "rho(t)", xlab = "Time")
lines(rho_summary$low, lty = 2, col = "gray")
lines(rho_summary$high, lty = 2, col = "gray")
abline(h = 0, lty = 3)

summary_df <- data.frame(
  mean_rho         = mean(rho_summary$mean),
  sd_rho           = sd(rho_summary$mean),
  mean_vol_ratio   = mean(vol_ratio),
  max_sigma1_value = max(s1_summary$mean),
  max_sigma2_value = max(s2_summary$mean),
  max_sigma1_time  = which.max(s1_summary$mean),
  max_sigma2_time  = which.max(s2_summary$mean),
  max_rho_time     = which.max(rho_summary$mean)
)

print(summary_df)
```



```{r}

common_bw_numeric <- intersect(dates_brent, dates_wti)

plot_dates <- as.Date(common_bw_numeric, origin = "1970-01-01")

par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 1))
plot(plot_dates, s1_summary$mean, type="l", col="blue", 
     ylim = c(0, max(s1_summary$high, s2_summary$high)),
     main = "Volatility: Brent vs LCO", ylab = "Volatility (Sigma)", xlab = "Date")
lines(plot_dates, s1_summary$low, lty=2, col="blue")
lines(plot_dates, s1_summary$high, lty=2, col="blue")
lines(plot_dates, s2_summary$mean, col="red")
lines(plot_dates, s2_summary$low, lty=2, col="red")
lines(plot_dates, s2_summary$high, lty=2, col="red")
legend("topright", legend=c("Brent Spot", "LCO Futures"), col=c("blue", "red"), lty=1, bty="n")
dev.off()

par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 1))
plot(plot_dates, vol_ratio, type = "l", 
     main = "Volatility Ratio (Brent Spot / LCO Futures)", 
     ylab = "Ratio", xlab = "Date", col = "darkgreen")
abline(h = 1, lty = 2, col = "black")
dev.off()

par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 1))
plot(plot_dates, rho_summary$mean, type = "l", ylim = c(0, 1), 
     main = "Time-Varying Correlation (Brent/LCO)", ylab = "Correlation (rho)", xlab = "Date", col = "purple")
lines(plot_dates, rho_summary$low, lty = 2, col = "purple", lwd = 0.5)
lines(plot_dates, rho_summary$high, lty = 2, col = "purple", lwd = 0.5)
dev.off()


summary_df_final <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Mean Correlation", "Mean Vol Ratio", "Max Brent Vol", "Max LCO Vol", "Max Correlation"),
  Value = c(mean(rho_summary$mean), mean(vol_ratio), max(s1_summary$mean), max(s2_summary$mean), max(rho_summary$mean)),
  Date = c(NA, NA, 
           as.character(plot_dates[which.max(s1_summary$mean)]), 
           as.character(plot_dates[which.max(s2_summary$mean)]), 
           as.character(plot_dates[which.max(rho_summary$mean)]))
)

grid.newpage()
grid.table(summary_df_final)
dev.off()


colnames(summary_df) <- c("Mean $\\rho$", "SD $\\rho$", "Mean Vol Ratio", 
                          "Max $\\sigma_1$", "Max $\\sigma_2$", 
                          "T (Max $\\sigma_1$)", "T (Max $\\sigma_2$)", "T (Max $\\rho$)")

cat(kable(summary_df, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, escape = FALSE, 
      digits = 4, caption = "Summary Statistics of Bivariate SV Model"))

png("5_MCMC_Trace_Scalars.png", width = 1200, height = 1400, res = 150)
print(mcmc_trace(draws_scalars))
dev.off()

png("6_MCMC_Pairs_Scalars.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)


print(mcmc_pairs(draws_scalars, 
                 pars = c("phi[1]", "phi[2]", "sigma_h[1]", "sigma_h[2]"),
                 off_diag_args = list(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.2))) # Makes dots smaller/lighter

dev.off()

```



```{r}
scalar_pars <- c("mu", "phi", "sigma_h", "phi_x", "sigma_x")

summary_scalars <- fit_sv$summary(variables = scalar_pars)

diagnostics_list <- list(
  max_rhat = max(summary_scalars$rhat, na.rm = TRUE),
  min_ess_bulk = min(summary_scalars$ess_bulk, na.rm = TRUE),
  min_ess_tail = min(summary_scalars$ess_tail, na.rm = TRUE)
)


```
